name: Alliance Aviation Services Limited
summary: Alliance Aviation Services Limited provides aviation services to tourism, resources, mining, education, government, corporate, and sporting sectors in Australia and internationally. The company also offers specialized aviation services, including aircraft wet leasing, airport management, aircraft trading, parts sales, engine leasing, and engineering to other airlines and clients. As of June 30, 2020, it operated a fleet of 24 Fokker F100 and 13 Fokker 70LR jet aircraft; and 5 Fokker 50 turboprops. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Brisbane, Australia.
